title: Sheet3 — L&A Process Taxonomy (Level 1/2/3)
grain: one row per Level-3 process, with its parent Level-1 and Level-2 categories
summary: The standardized three-level process taxonomy (Level 1 → Level 2 → Level 3) used to classify L&A delivery work. Each row is a Level-3 process rolled up to its Level-2 and Level-1 parents. Reference table for the process hierarchy that the process sheets tag against.
use_cases: What is the standard L&A process taxonomy?
Which Level-3 processes roll up to a given Level-1 category (e.g. Product Development)?
What are the Level-2 sub-categories under a Level-1 area?

not_answerable.q: Which clients or headcount are associated with each process
not_answerable.reason: this is a pure taxonomy/reference table with no client or measure columns
